docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,331.30 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MCCORMICK, EDEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECL OF PROCESS SERVER: UNABLE TO SERVE.
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-01-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-04-2004 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PLTF'S CLAIM SENT TO EDEN MCCORMICK AND FORWARDED TO FRY'S ELECTRONICS PERSONNEL/HUMAN RESOURCES RETURNED--NO LONGER EMPLOYED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCORMICK, EDEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCORMICK, EDEN $4,331.30 PRINCIPAL, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,427.30, DEFENDANT FILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO EDEN MCCORMICK RETURNED--FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED
